name: Obul API Marketplace
description: Collection of pay-per-use APIs accessed through the Obul proxy (proxy.obul.ai). Each API is wrapped as a skill for AI agents.

apis.name: obul-proxy
apis.description: Proxy any request through Obul to access x402 APIs with automatic payment handling

apis.name: obul-llm
apis.description: Access LLMs (GPT-4o, Claude, etc.) via category routing with cheapest-first provider selection and automatic failover

apis.name: obul-api-finder
apis.description: Search, fetch, and install Obul API skills. Self-contained skill management tool.

apis.name: obul-api-errors
apis.description: Reference guide for HTTP error codes returned by the Obul proxy

apis.name: obul-api-optimizer
apis.description: Find cheapest API providers, compare pricing, audit API usage for cost savings

apis.name: obul-cli
apis.description: obulx CLI for making paid x402 API calls through the Obul proxy with OAuth device flow or API key auth

endpoints.description: Proxy request — price depends on upstream endpoint
